description: WAI-WAY context map - maps phases to required files. READ the scaffolded files, they contain inline documentation.
golden_rule: THE SCAFFOLDED FILES ARE YOUR DOCUMENTATION. Read the file. Follow the pattern. Extend.

document_chain.spec_template.md: FORMAT — the empty shell the Extractor fills through conversation. NOT kept as-is.
document_chain.docs/PRD.md: OUTPUT — Product Requirements (journeys, rules, permissions). The WHAT.
document_chain.docs/HLD.md: OUTPUT — High-Level Design (preset, auth, pages, features). The HOW (big picture).
document_chain.docs/LLD.md: OUTPUT — Low-Level Design (per-entity specs, state machines, access). The HOW (detailed).
document_chain..dndev/implementation.md: MACRO PLAN — checklist per phase. Versioned, archived per project version.
document_chain..dndev/captain-log.json: SESSION HISTORY — auto-recorded on approve_phase. Never deleted.
document_chain..dndev/LESSONS.md: GOTCHAS — tagged, scored, filtered by phase. Never deleted.

0_brainstorm.goal: Gather requirements through conversation and produce validated specification documents
0_brainstorm.flow: User idea → Agent questions (using spec_template.md format) → User validates → Agent splits into PRD + HLD + LLD
0_brainstorm.done_when: docs/PRD.md + docs/HLD.md + docs/LLD.md complete and validated by user

1_scaffold.goal: Running app with all routes defined as interactive prototype stubs
1_scaffold.done_when: All routes listed, all *Page.tsx files created with correct PageMeta, clickable prototype
1_scaffold.output: All *Page.tsx files created with PageMeta, clickable prototype

2_entities.goal: Define all data models from LLD
2_entities.done_when: All entities defined with fields, access, visibility. Exported from index.ts

3_compose.done_when: All pages functional, CRUD uses EntityList/EntityFormRenderer, strings hardcoded
3_compose.output: All pages functional with hardcoded content

4_configure_test.goal: Generate tests, firestore rules, CI/CD, finalize config
4_configure_test.done_when: Tests pass, firestore.rules generated, config complete, mobile responsive
4_configure_test.output: Test files, firestore.rules, CI/CD, configured app

spec_documents.docs/PRD.md: Product Requirements — journeys, rules, permissions (produced by P0)
spec_documents.docs/HLD.md: High-Level Design — preset, auth, pages, features (produced by P0)
spec_documents.docs/LLD.md: Low-Level Design — per-entity specs, state machines, access (produced by P0)

spec_formats.guides/wai-way/spec_template.md: Conversation FORMAT — empty shell agent fills through questions

operational..dndev/implementation.md: Active macro plan — checklist per phase (versioned)

config.src/config/app.ts: App name, preset, features, auth routes

entities.entities/ExampleEntity.ts: defineEntity pattern, field types, access rules

workflow.summary: BRAINSTORM (→ PRD + HLD + LLD) → SCAFFOLD → ENTITIES → COMPOSE → CONFIGURE + TEST
workflow.critical_rule: spec_template.md is the FORMAT. P0 produces PRD + HLD + LLD. Validated documents = mechanical build.
